'''kakoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:saafa|saafa]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-k-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:saafa|saafa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kakoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kækeheth|kækeheth]] || [[word:kækehej|kækehej]] || [[word:kækehesh|kækehesh]] || [[word:kækehe|kækehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kakokohoth|kakokohoth]] || [[word:kakokohoj|kakokohoj]] || [[word:kakokohosh|kakokohosh]] || [[word:kakokoho|kakokoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kakohoth|kakohoth]] || [[word:kakohoj|kakohoj]] || [[word:kakohosh|kakohosh]] || [[word:kakoho|kakoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kakofhoth|kakofhoth]] || [[word:kakofhoj|kakofhoj]] || [[word:kakofhosh|kakofhosh]] || [[word:kakofhof|kakofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kakohotho|kakohotho]] || [[word:kakohojo|kakohojo]] || [[word:kakohosho|kakohosho]] || [[word:kakohoko|kakohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kakohoth|kakohoth]] || [[word:kakohoj|kakohoj]] || [[word:kakohosh|kakohosh]] || [[word:kakoho|kakoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kakohothol|kakohothol]] || [[word:kakohojol|kakohojol]] || [[word:kakohoshol|kakohoshol]] || [[word:kakohokol|kakohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kakohothotho|kakohothotho]] || [[word:kakohojojo|kakohojojo]] || [[word:kakohoshosho|kakohoshosho]] || [[word:kakohoko|kakohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kakohothon|kakohothon]] || [[word:kakohojon|kakohojon]] || [[word:kakohoshon|kakohoshon]] || [[word:kakohokon|kakohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kakohothoro|kakohothoro]] || [[word:kakohojoro|kakohojoro]] || [[word:kakohoshoro|kakohoshoro]] || [[word:kakohokoro|kakohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
